fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item that exists as lot numbers in the bin.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the zone that is assigned to the bin where the lot number exists.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the lot number exists.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number that exists in the bin.

fields.name: Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many items with the lot number exist in the bin.
